note: Existing per-domain stories (~280) remain in docs/<domain>/user-stories.md; import epics first, then attach stories per release.

epics.title: Identity & sessions
epics.description: Login, rotating refresh sessions, password reset/activation, impersonation with audit. Detail: docs/auth/user-stories.md E1–E3. Folds BF-030 (password rules shown up-front, special chars).

epics.title: Tenancy & profiles
epics.description: Profiles + satellites, profile switching, business identity/timezone/address. Detail: docs/settings/user-stories.md E1–E2, E8. Folds BF-045 (zipcode input bug).

epics.title: Teams & per-profile roles
epics.description: Net-new (v1 Teams tab was a stub). Invites, accept flow, member management, role enforcement (owner/admin/member). Stories TEAM-1.1–1.5 in docs/foundation/04-epics-and-stories.md.

epics.title: Billing, plans & entitlements
epics.description: Net-new (v1 Gold/Platinum was hardcoded UI text). Stripe Billing, plan catalog, entitlement gating, dunning, staff overrides. Stories BILL-1.1–1.5.

epics.title: Onboarding wizard (real backend)
epics.description: Net-new (v1 wizard was an unwired mockup). Resumable setup state, company/questionnaire/team/accounts/automation steps, default content seeding. Stories ONBD-1.1–1.7.

epics.title: Contacts
epics.description: Address book: list/create/edit, tags, lifecycle, activity timeline, CSV import (async, per-row outcomes), export, auto-activation. Detail: docs/contacts/user-stories.md E1–E7.

epics.title: Reviews feed & sharing
epics.description: Unified review feed, manual add, reply, branded review-image render, share/schedule, auto-share config with threshold + template round-robin, calendar. Detail: docs/reviews/user-stories.md R1–R6.

epics.title: Design & funnel
epics.description: Funnel editors (canonical — reviews F1/F2/P1 are summaries), platform-link manager, public funnel SSR. Detail: docs/design-funnel/user-stories.md D1–D3.

epics.title: Media library
epics.description: S3 presigned upload, reference-counted usage, reference-aware delete. Detail: docs/media/user-stories.md M1–M4.

epics.title: Campaigns & eligibility engine
epics.description: Email/SMS invite campaigns, single derived eligibility engine (fixes v1 activator/reconcile split-brain), editor, stats on read models, drip presets. Detail: docs/campaigns/user-stories.md C1–C6.

epics.title: Connect messaging & calls
epics.description: Two-way SMS inbox (SSE real-time), broadcast, scheduled messages, keyword auto-responder, calls/forwarding, number provisioning. Detail: docs/messaging/user-stories.md M1–M7.

epics.title: Twilio A2P + TFV + consent pages
epics.description: A2P 10DLC wizard, toll-free verification (Twilio Embeddable per AD-15, stories TFV-1.1–1.6), public unsubscribe + FB data-deletion pages. Detail: docs/compliance/user-stories.md E1–E6.

epics.title: Social publishing & planner
epics.description: Composer, timeline, retry/edit/delete posts, testimonial sharing, content planner (single campaign engine), insights. Detail: docs/social/user-stories.md.

epics.title: Surveys
epics.description: Builder, public taking page, results/export, prebuilt templates, completion notifications (exactly-once, resilient). Detail: docs/surveys/user-stories.md E1–E5.

epics.title: Widgets
epics.description: 7 widget types as iframe SSR embeds, typed jsonb config (off profile), chat lead capture. Detail: docs/widgets/user-stories.md E1–E6.

epics.title: Analytics & dashboard
epics.description: Dashboard tabs on denormalized read models (replica-ready), GBP insights, keywords, targets, nav badges. Detail: docs/analytics/user-stories.md.

epics.title: Integrations, OAuth vault & webhooks
epics.description: Provider gateways + error taxonomy, AES-GCM token vault, connect/disconnect lifecycle with grace-period cascade, verified webhooks. Detail: docs/integrations/user-stories.md E1–E5.

epics.title: New review platforms
epics.description: WeddingWire, The Knot, Houzz (wave 1); RateMyAgent, Avvo, Homes/Angie, Redfin (wave 2). Each gated by PLAT-0.1 API feasibility spike. Stories PLAT-0.1–1.4.

epics.title: AI template & content generation
epics.description: Custom review templates, AI-generated share copy (quota-gated entitlement), real AI-usage metric. Stories AI-1.1–1.3.

epics.title: Notifications hub
epics.description: Net-new module consolidating prefs, event fan-out, nav badges, push devices, and the delivery ledger (PF-6). Stories NOTIF-1.1–1.4.

epics.title: Back office
epics.description: Staff console: users, profiles, templates, push campaigns, deletion queue, referrals directory. Detail: docs/admin/user-stories.md A1–A12.

epics.title: Support & tutorials
epics.description: Help center + tutorial catalog with categories/search, contextual prompts; TU-001–021 video content production. Detail: docs/support + docs/tutorials user-stories.

epics.title: Referral program
epics.description: Operator referral settings + admin directory. Detail: docs/referrals/user-stories.md RF1–RF2.

stories.title: Invite a teammate
stories.description: Owner invites by email with role (admin|member); pending membership + 7-day token; re-invite replaces token; ledger row per invite email.

stories.title: Accept an invite
stories.description: Invite link walks Visitor to working portal; expired/used tokens show distinct states; profile appears in switcher on accept.

stories.title: Manage members
stories.description: List members, change roles, remove. Cannot demote/remove last owner; removal revokes sessions for the profile; guards read DB not JWT claims.

stories.title: Role enforcement
stories.description: member role cannot perform admin-only actions (billing, team mgmt, profile delete, Connect activation); server-enforced; UI hides what API forbids.

stories.title: Reps can activate Connect
stories.description: Profile admin (non-owner) can complete Connect/SMS activation; gated by role + entitlement, not owner-ness.

stories.title: Plan catalog
stories.description: Staff-Admin defines plans (price, entitlement set, limits) synced to Stripe Products/Prices; plans versioned.

stories.title: Subscribe / upgrade / downgrade
stories.description: Owner picks plan via Stripe Checkout/Billing portal; entitlements update ≤1min after webhook; downgrades at period end; all transitions recorded (plan-change history).

stories.title: Entitlement gating
stories.description: @RequireEntitlement guard on routes + worker-side check before spending provider money; over-limit SMS queued-not-dropped with upgrade prompt.

stories.title: Dunning & suspension
stories.description: Payment failure → Stripe smart retries → grace state → feature suspension; data never deleted.

stories.title: Staff override
stories.description: Staff-Manager+ grants comp/trial entitlements with reason + expiry, audited. Replaces v1 manual flag-flipping.

stories.title: Resumable setup state
stories.description: profile_onboarding row (step, answers jsonb); partial answers saved per step; completion stops re-prompting.

stories.title: Company details step
stories.description: Writes real profiles + satellite fields; address triggers timezone resolution (PF-3).

stories.title: Questionnaire step
stories.description: Persists answers; selected goals map to recommended feature checklists on dashboard.

stories.title: Team step
stories.description: Reuses TEAM-1.1 invites inside the wizard.

stories.title: Connect-accounts step
stories.description: Reuses INT OAuth flows with inline connect state.

stories.title: Automation step
stories.description: Configures auto-activation + default campaign activation with plain-language copy of what will send (BF-037 confusion prevention).

stories.title: Default content seeding
stories.description: On profile creation seed default campaigns (Initial/Follow-up/Final email + SMS), funnel design, messaging settings — in DB, idempotently.

stories.title: Start verification
stories.description: Eligible + feature-flagged Owner starts TFV; API initializes inquiry → inquiry_id + session token; ineligible profiles never see entry point.

stories.title: Resume verification
stories.description: Owner resumes a started verification where they left off (session token re-issued).

stories.title: Status tracking
stories.description: Normalized status draft→submitted→needs_correction→approved|rejected with history; webhook is a hint, reconciling poll job is truth.

stories.title: Correct & resubmit
stories.description: Owner sees rejection reasons and re-enters the embedded form to fix them.

stories.title: Admin TFV panel
stories.description: Staff views any profile's TFV state, assigns toll-free number pre-verification, triggers manual sync, sees rejection/status history.

stories.title: Sender activation
stories.description: Toll-free sending enabled only when approved + number assigned; deactivation always resets local state even if Twilio-side cleanup fails (v1 subaccount deadlock fix).

stories.title: Notification preferences
stories.description: Per-profile recipients/channels per event type (new review, negative review, survey completed, failed post, inbound SMS); push devices server-registered.

stories.title: Event fan-out
stories.description: Domain events fan out to subscribed channels through the send pipeline with a ledger row each; failed channel never blocks others (PF-7).

stories.title: Nav badges
stories.description: Per-tab attention counts + profile-switcher totals; single polling interval torn down on unmount (regression test).

stories.title: Delivery visibility
stories.description: Staff-Support answers 'did profile X get their notification and why not' from the admin ledger view in one lookup.

stories.title: API feasibility spike (per platform)
stories.description: Written finding per platform: official API / partner program / compliant scrape / not feasible — with rate limits, auth model, field coverage. Gates all other PLAT stories.

stories.title: Connect platform account
stories.description: Operator connects/disconnects platform X through the standard INT lifecycle (PF-5/PF-8).

stories.title: Pull reviews
stories.description: System pulls on cadence into the unified feed; dedupe by provider review id.

stories.title: Feed parity
stories.description: Reviews from X filter/search/share like any source; manual-add platform list includes X (generalizes the GigSalad ask).

stories.title: Funnel link
stories.description: Platform X joins the funnel platform catalog (FUN links).

stories.title: Custom review templates
stories.description: Operator creates own share templates alongside stock; auto-share round-robin draws from selected set; templates are versioned media assets rendered by the render worker.

stories.title: AI-generated share copy
stories.description: Generated post text per review (tone presets, edit-before-post always); provider behind a gateway; per-profile monthly quota (entitlement); nothing auto-publishes outside existing approval path.

stories.title: AI usage metric
stories.description: Dashboard 'AI Used' reads a real counter (v1 hardcoded 0%).
